concept: My Test Taking Strategy Is Vibes
title: My Test Taking Strategy Is Vibes Shirt, Funny Exam Tee, Student Finals Week Gift, Teacher Humor Back To School T Shirt
description:
Some people bring flashcards. You bring vibes, caffeine, and a completely unearned sense of hope.
This tee is for anyone who has ever looked at a test, whispered we will see, and let fate take the wheel.

Equal parts funny and painfully accurate, this design turns exam panic into a personality trait. It is the perfect uniform for students, teachers, tutors, and former gifted kids now operating on pure adrenaline. Wear it to class, study group, test prep, or anytime your academic strategy is mostly eye contact with the ceiling and trusting your instincts. It has that very specific I did what I could and now the universe decides energy that gets laughs from literally every desk in the room.

Perfect for:
• high school and college students heading into quizzes, midterms, finals, and standardized tests
• teachers, tutors, and school staff with elite levels of classroom sarcasm
• anxious overthinkers, chaotic achievers, and anyone who calls guessing intuition
• back to school gifts, finals week care packages, and funny exam day outfits

DETAILS:
• Relaxed unisex fit with an easy everyday feel for campus runs, study marathons, or recovering emotionally after the test.
• Available in two print variants: dark ink artwork for light shirts and bright saturated artwork for dark shirts.
• The design features bold stacked typography reading MY TEST TAKING STRATEGY IS VIBES plus a minimalist bubble sheet, frazzled pencil doodle, and tiny spark accents.
• Made to order, so your humor shows up fresh whether you are cramming tonight or processing the results later.

Product features
• 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
• Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
• Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
• Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
• Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Care instructions
• Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
• Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
• Tumble dry: low heat
• Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
• Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
